title: 2 pcs Soft Close Cabinet Hinges with 4 pcs Hinge Repair Plate, Full Overlay Kitchen Door Hinge, Stainless Steel Cupboard Door Hinge with Screws
features: Soft Close Hinges - This soft close door hinges featuring hydraulic dampers that let your cabinet doors close smoothly and quietly, aiding in a safer and quieter closing of the cabinet doors to protect hands and fingers.

Full Overlay Design - These cabinet hinges are 3-way adjustable, meaning you can adjust them up and down, left and right, front and back. This ensures that your new custom cabinet doors can be adjusted in depth, on the sides, and in height to ensure proper alignment and smooth opening and closing.

Hinge Repair Kit Plate for Cabinet - The hinge repair plate is widely used for fixing various types of furniture, such as wardrobes, dressing tables, cabinets, and more. It effectively addresses issues like loose hinges or difficulties in installation caused by factors like dampness, frequent usage, or the quality of the material itself. The package includes installation screws, and all you need to do is tighten them with a screwdriver. Covering the damaged area enhances its appearance, making it look more aesthetically pleasing.
High-Quality Material - Durable and reliable. The cabinet door hinges and hinge repair kit are made of high-grade stainless steel, which is rust-proof and wear-resistant, and has a long service life.
What You Get - 2 x Door hinges, 4 x Cabinet hinge repair plate, 34 x Screws, 1 x User Manual
